privacy_filter.note: no real user trajectory data is read by this builder; this pass is defense-in-depth over benchmark + synthetic rows

benchmark_alignment.eliza1_eval_suite_text: general assistant + factual turns mirror the held-out text-eval corpus topics
benchmark_alignment.format_ok_gate: action_selection rows teach 'ACTION: NAME {params}' + structured_decode rows teach the W3 flat JSON envelope (shouldRespond/thought/replyText/contexts/.../requiresTool/extract) that buildResponseGrammar constrains
benchmark_alignment.structured_decode: Stage-1 response envelope rows — JSON (not TOON), key order matches packages/core/src/runtime/response-grammar.ts STAGE1_ENVELOPE_KEYS; direct + non-direct paths
benchmark_alignment.voice_emotion: spoken replies with omnivoice-singing inline tags ([happy]/[sad]/[angry]/[nervous]/[calm]/[excited]/[whisper]/[singing] + non-verbals [laughter]/[sigh]) in replyText
